many-to-one.name: company
many-to-one.title: Company
many-to-one.help: Company this loan configuration applies to.

many-to-one.name: journal
many-to-one.title: Journal
many-to-one.help: Journal used to book loan accounting entries.

many-to-one.name: sequence
many-to-one.title: Loan sequence
many-to-one.help: Sequence used to number loans on validation.

many-to-one.name: borrowingDebtAccount
many-to-one.title: Borrowing debt account
many-to-one.help: Account 164 - loan principal debt owed to the lender.

many-to-one.name: interestExpenseAccount
many-to-one.title: Interest expense account
many-to-one.help: Account 661 - interest charges on the loan.

many-to-one.name: insuranceExpenseAccount
many-to-one.title: Insurance expense account
many-to-one.help: Account 616 - insurance premiums attached to the loan.

many-to-one.name: bankAccount
many-to-one.title: Bank account
many-to-one.help: Account 512 - bank account used for loan cash movements.

many-to-one.name: accruedInterestAccount
many-to-one.title: Accrued interest account
many-to-one.help: Account 16884 - accrued interest not yet due (ICNE).
